case_title: CECILIA HERNANDEZ VS. WALTER JESUS BUIZA-SILVA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, CECILIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $436.63 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, CECILIA AS TO DEFENDANT BUIZA-SILVA, WALTER JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, CECILIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUIZA-SILVA, WALTER JESUS $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
